text.title: API Rate Limiting Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by the observables defined in 02-output-contract.xml to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: verdict=fail; define free / paid / partner tiers

branch.question: every tier has per_second + per_minute + per_hour?

conclusion.verdict: verdict=fail; set both burst + sustained per tier

text.example: key_source=jwt-sub → tiers=3 → all 3 windows per tier → conclusion 429-with-retry-after → pass.
